Haste %
QuoteReply
# Aug 16 2003 at 1:36 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591788559298
26 posts
The Haste % on a GoF is 41%. This is 20% better than a FBSS and has decent stats. I am certain that there is much more 00b3r gear for twinks out there, but i can't live online like you all.

BTW, i'll be terribly dissapointed if my post isn't trashed by some immature jerk. :P
▲ Page top
Godly
QuoteReply
# Oct 21 2002 at 4:54 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591775939977
9 posts
I got the ivory sky diamond and silvery girdle on a PoA guild reid 2 weeks ago - yesterday bought diaphonous globe for 5k = and now I got this girlde - man it is GODLY. With it and valor of marr I have the same feeling of haste as with RBG and Aanya's quickenign :) Uber solo item and very difficult to get. GL to you all on one day obtaining it (the key here is good guild as PoA raids are long and difficult)
▲ Page top
Belts in the Planes
QuoteReply
# Jan 12 2002 at 9:33 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1595780881775
1,154 posts
Although most things in the PoA are not as good as things later obtained.... the belts are. Laanyan said AC and HP are king, and this is true when going on big raids that have to do with you being a human meat sheild, but when in smaller groups and when soloing Haste is just about the best thing you can have, especially as a Melee or Hybrid, which you are. This item is one not easily to be replaced, and if you are already using any other Sashes, you could get some money back or Xfer this to another or what ever because this is just about the best belt for Pallys. If you would do 1 PoA quest let it be this one, and you will not come across a nicer belt for a while and possibly never, and this is one a LVL 60 could still be proud to wear.
▲ Page top
RE: Belts in the Planes
QuoteReply
# Jan 05 2003 at 9:46 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361242995
27 posts
The only time ac and hp's are king on a raid is when you're main or secondary assist. If you're just one of the extras walking around hitting stuff, then those stats are worthless. If you have poor damage output, then you're doing nothing to help your raid and might as well go home.
▲ Page top
RE: Belts in the Planes
QuoteReply
# Aug 19 2003 at 7:28 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591788077815
34 posts
your lvl 65 kupdor, you know just as well as i do rampage and aoe hits just about everyone at a raid. hp ac king for all classes.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Feb 15 2003 at 8:47 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Dumbass newb. You're probably the one whose going home and not see ANY sort of raid.
RE: Belts in the Planes
QuoteReply
# Feb 15 2003 at 7:20 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592756546780
View User Forum
20 posts
Wrong. Since luclin at least all classes except maybe wizard have been HP's > all

Fight an AoE mob with low HP's, no matter what buffs you have, if you don't have a certain amout of HP's base, then you are going to require eiother too much mana to heal, or die. Either way slows down a raid. For a Paladin AC is the next stat you need because you end up tanking about 90 percent of the time in tier 2 groups due to the amout of AC you can aquire with the sheild and full plate gear. That and Paladins have better agro than warrs due to stuns and other spells.

# Sep 24 2001 at 2:11 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591765004652
74 posts
ac is King, hps are Queen, resists and haste are close below that, depends on what you're doing, all else is a nice bonus. I'd go for this belt for the ac and it's got some nice stats. I've got a bunch of armor combinations, but want a belt upgrade, spider fur aint bad, good ac and hps, but I'm down too much wisdom.
▲ Page top
Haste is god
QuoteReply
# Jun 26 2001 at 11:20 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591756060085
32 posts
Haste is GOD. AC is a close second to a certain point. than it is overtaken by hp/resists.
Depending on what your definition of haste is then both 17% and 21% are correct for fbss.

The haste on fbss is 21%.
The drop in delay is 17%.

These are 2 different things.

haste is calculated by 1/(1+(%haste item+%haste spell))
so fbss is 1/1+0.21 = 1/1.21 = 0.826 ~ 0.83
So what is the delay drop? from 100 - 83 or 17% drop in delay.

So that's where all of the confusion lies. fbss is 21% haste. but it only makes you 17% faster.

PoA belts roxor..

Biz.
▲ Page top
RE: Haste is god
QuoteReply
# Mar 08 2004 at 5:45 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592761295638
254 posts
Unless your a gm or developer your haste caluculation is wrong. Sony hasnt revealed any of it's calculations for haste so u must be lying.

▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 28 2001 at 12:07 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Your a ******* idiot so dont think you know it all to the person who posted before me. This belt is 36-37 percent haste. The belt of virtue is 16-17 percent haste. The FBSS is 21% haste. And another thing I think some newbies have been posting here cause I have the belt of virtue and it kicks the **** out of my fbss. 8ac, 5wisdom, 5str 5svmagic 16-17 percent haste vs fbss 21 percent haste. HMM I am lvl 53 and I would much rather have all the stats and take 4 to 5 percent less haste anyday. AC is god whoever said that, and the wisdom and the str is great also.
